intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把旧街屋场景、交换动作和最后的固定惯例读顺。

sentences.text: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.
sentences.focus_zh: have just moved 要读出“我现在刚搬来、还很新”的感觉。

sentences.text: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.
sentences.focus_zh: knocked at my door 作为一个动作短语连起来读。

sentences.text: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
sentences.focus_zh: asked me for 后面接两个东西，meal 和 glass of beer 分清楚。

sentences.text: In return for this, the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.
sentences.focus_zh: In return for this 后面稍停，再读清楚 stood on his head。

sentences.text: Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away.
sentences.focus_zh: a piece of cheese 和 in his pocket 是两个重点短语。

sentences.text: Later a neighbour told me about him. Everybody knows him.
sentences.focus_zh: Everybody knows him 是揭晓答案，要读得像邻居在解释。

sentences.text: He calls at every house in the street once a month and always asks for a meal and a glass of beer.
sentences.focus_zh: calls at、once a month、always asks 三个规律提示要读清楚。
